reason: Backend quality bar: cargo test, cargo clippy, no warnings, error classification.
Check error message wording for user-facing toast strings; assert self-heal paths use tracing::warn! not silent.
Frontend quality bar: vue-tsc strict, no new console warnings, no type leaks.
Verify system prompt shape is documented in Scenario 7 update; test the wire format.
Check that Bug 3 system prompt round-trips correctly through rehydrate (no double-render).
PRD as the source of truth for acceptance criteria.
